title: fix: bump Tinybird model stats limit from 50 to 200
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: No model left behind
gist.blurb: We fixed a tiny bug where some of our AI models were hiding from the pricing page. Now all 65+ models proudly display their pollen estimates!
gist.summary: Increased the Tinybird model stats fetch limit from 50 to 200 to ensure all available models are properly retrieved.
gist.impact: Users will now see accurate per-pollen cost estimates on the pricing page for all models, including those that were previously missing.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot looking at a very long, unrolled list or receipt of data. Represents the expanded limit of items being fetched and displayed.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a very long, unrolled paper scroll filled with pixelated charts and numbers. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head looks at the scroll excitedly, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
